title: Create Aeronautics: Dyeable Components
description: This is an addon for Create Aeronautics that makes various components dyeable!
body:
This mod makes various aeronautics components dyeable

Dyed Levitite
Dyed levitite is simply a dyeable version of levitite though you need to do something special to make it, while catalysing levitite you need to hold the desired dye color in your offhand to get the correct resulting color!
![Trans flag made of levitite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323936e012d5a9a59b0b7ba5d50e13563e68980b.png)
Dyeable Tires
Dyeable Tires gives each tire type its own dyed varients simply put a tire in the crafting table with a dye and you get the dyed varients!
![Tires of various sizes and colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/095c91b0d0fcfbcb22166c950668e44a0ef98f49.png)
